title: Upon Julia's Ribbon
content:
As shews the air when with a rain-bow graced,
So smiles that ribbon 'bout my Julia's waist;
Or like Nay, 'tis that Zonulet of love,
Wherein all pleasures of the world are wove.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Julia's Ribbon"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
